name: Cajun Spice Mixture
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Rub the mixture into meat thoroughly.
3. If grilling, let the meat stand for 30 minutes before cooking.
4. This works well when smoking brisket. Place the meaty sides of two briskets together, roll them, and retie.
5. Place the rolled briskets in the smoker for 8 to 10 hours depending on the size of the briskets.
6. Use a meat thermometer to determine doneness.
7. For ribs, rub the mixture all over the ribs and cook as you always do.
8. This amount will be enough for 6 to 8 pork chops or hamburger patties.
